title: Trump won't veto housing bill, Johnson says after meeting: Exclusive
shortDescription: In an interview with USA TODAY, House Speaker Mike Johnson said he was certain Trump wouldn't veto a landmark housing bill, ensuring it'll become law.

title: Sneak peek to exclusive interview with Speaker Mike Johnson
shortDescription: White House correspondent Francesca Chambers interviews House Speaker Mike Johnson and discusses Iran war, housing bill and America’s 250th anniversary.

title: House passes kids online safety bill, but Senate isn't sold on it
shortDescription: Lawmakers in the House now have to navigate big differences with the Senate's efforts.

title: President Trump reacts to Supreme Court decisions
shortDescription: President Donald reacted to Supreme Court decisions on mail-in ballots and presidential power to fire independent agency leaders.

title: Trump shrugs off housing bill
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says he has not received the housing bill yet and calls it a "big yawn" and "so unimportant" while pushing the SAVE Act.

title: Trump calls landmark affordable housing bill 'a big yawn'
shortDescription: President Trump said he isn't sure he will sign a bipartisan housing bill, dismissing it as a "a big yawn" compared to the voting overhaul he wants.

title: New York Stock Exchange to ring opening bell from the Oval Office
shortDescription: Trump will host NYSE and Nasdaq, as they participate in the first-ever joint opening bell ceremony from the Oval Office next week.

title: How did Trump do today at Supreme Court? Here's a scorecard
shortDescription: The Supreme Court dealt the Trump agenda major blows on economic regulation and mail-in voting, but also expanded Trump's power over federal agencies.

title: Trump vows action after Supreme Court losses
shortDescription: President Donald Trump vowed action after losses in the Supreme Court related to Lisa Cook, mail-in voting and a $5 million defamation judgement.

title: New Maine Senate poll finds Platner with slim lead, despite controversies
shortDescription: Democrat Graham Platner holds a slight lead over Susan Collins in Maine's Senate race despite Platner's recent controversies, according to a new poll.

title: Vanilla Ice didn’t get to perform at Trump’s fair
shortDescription: Vanilla Ice was one of the few acts remaining after a slate of performers pulled out due to the Great American State Fair's political affiliations.

title: Trump Administration investigates MARTA spending as World Cup continues
shortDescription: Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy said MARTA met initial safety deadline for investigation, but it won't stop there following deadly attacks.

title: Supreme Court blocks Trump from firing Lisa Cook at Federal Reserve
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ruled 5-4 that President Donald Trump cannot fire Lisa Cook from the Federal Reserve, maintaining checks on presidential power and Fed independence.

title: Supreme Court allows late mail-in ballots in Mississippi
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is upholding Mississippi's rule to count mail-in ballots received within five days after Election Day, halting Trump's attack on voting by mail.

title: Supreme Court gives Trump more power over government agencies
shortDescription: President Trump argued presidents must be able to fire leaders of independent agencies like the Federal Trade Commission to keep them accountable to voters.

title: Supreme Court won't let Trump fire Lisa Cook from Fed
shortDescription: The Supreme Court rebuffed President Trump’s effort to exert unprecedented control over the economy, ruling he can’t fire Lisa Cook from the Fed.

title: Supreme Court OKs late-arriving mailed ballots in loss for Trump
shortDescription: The GOP challenge to grace periods for mailed ballots was part of President Trump's broad attack on voting by mail.

title: Arizona voter registration laws face Supreme Court test
shortDescription: The Supreme Court will review state voter registration laws in Arizona. Lower courts have said they conflict with federal rules and suppress the vote.

title: Supreme Court to take up law protecting runaway trans kids from parents
shortDescription: The case is the first this Supreme Court has agreed to hear that's centered on parents' rights to be involved in a child’s gender identity transition.

title: $5 million sex abuse verdict against Trump stands, Supreme Court rules
shortDescription: President Donald Trump asked the Supreme Court to overturn a decision that found him liable for sexually abusing and defaming writer E. Jean Carroll.

title: Supreme Court decisions: Trump vows action after Lisa Cook ruling
shortDescription: The Supreme Court issued major decisions June 29 on mail-in ballots and Federal Reserve Board Governor Lisa Cook.

title: Biden blasts Trump's White House projects
shortDescription: Former President Joe Biden called Donald Trump a 'loser' at a Maryland gala, slamming his 'vanity' White House projects and 'Reflecting Pool' narcissism.
